orderInfo.expr:
SELECT
	COUNT(*)
FROM
	daftar AS d
WHERE
gampong = g.id

sql:
SELECT 
    g.id, 
    g.gampong, 
    g.hp_kader,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM daftar d WHERE d.gampong = g.id) AS jumlah_kunjungan,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pasien p WHERE p.id_gampong = g.id) AS jumlah_penduduk
FROM gampong g
ORDER BY jumlah_kunjungan DESC
name: gampong

fields.name: jumlah_kunjungan
fields.sqlExpression: (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM daftar d WHERE d.gampong = g.id)

fields.name: jumlah_penduduk
fields.sqlExpression: (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pasien p WHERE p.id_gampong = g.id)
